english: the shape of a basket repeatedly woven from bamboo

etymology.description: two йӯҡ(йӯҡ) (yГә, "fish") with their mouths facing each other -> original script of йҒҳ(йҒҳ) (gГІu, "to meet; to encounter")
etymology.interpretation: The character еҶ“(gГІu) originally depicted two fish facing each other, symbolizing a meeting or encounter. This visual composition was later borrowed for its phonetic value to represent the concept 'to meet' in йҒҳ(gГІu).
